# Sahil Bhanvadiya Portfolio

> Sahil Bhanvadiya is a senior full-stack engineer and freelance consultant specializing in React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, healthcare AI, FHIR R4, LangGraph, LLM integration, and AWS. Available for contract work with US, EU, and global clients.

This file helps AI systems find curated portfolio content, technical case studies, and contact information.

## Portfolio

- [Homepage](https://sahilbhanvadiya.vercel.app/): Experience, tech stack, featured projects, testimonials, FAQ, and contact options.
- [Case Studies](https://sahilbhanvadiya.vercel.app/case-studies): Index of all technical case studies.

## Case Studies

- [AI-Powered Precision Medicine & Health Navigation Platform](https://sahilbhanvadiya.vercel.app/case-studies/precision-medicine-health-navigation-platform): Healthcare & AI. Role: Senior Full-Stack & AI Engineer. Designed FHIR R4-compliant data pipelines and a multi-agent LangGraph system to translate complex clinical records into plain-language, personalized treatment navigation for 500K+ medical records.
- [AI Triage & Intake System for a Precision Wellness Platform](https://sahilbhanvadiya.vercel.app/case-studies/ai-powered-triage-wellness-platform): Healthcare & AI. Role: Full-Stack Developer & Project Manager. Architected a secure full-stack wellness platform with a LangGraph-powered AI triage agent, RAG-backed health coaching, and real-time Socket.io handoffs between patients and human coaches.
- [Connected Enterprise EMR & Telehealth Platform](https://sahilbhanvadiya.vercel.app/case-studies/enterprise-emr-telehealth-platform): Healthcare. Role: Full-Stack Developer. Built a unified cloud healthcare platform linking EMR and CHR modules with real-time vitals monitoring, Socket.io messaging, and embedded telehealth for collaborative remote care.
- [Multi-Platform Event Management & Brand Engagement Ecosystem](https://sahilbhanvadiya.vercel.app/case-studies/event-management-brand-engagement): Event Management. Role: Project Manager & Lead Full-Stack Developer. Led end-to-end development of a multi-platform event ecosystem with tiered ticketing, staff mobile redemption tools, and multi-tenant brand engagement across web, admin, and mobile apps.
- [Real-Time Cryptocurrency Mining & Analytics Dashboard](https://sahilbhanvadiya.vercel.app/case-studies/crypto-mining-analytics-dashboard): Fintech & Analytics. Role: Full-Stack Developer. Built a high-frequency mining analytics dashboard with a Node.js data aggregation engine and optimized React/Redux frontend for zero-lag profitability tracking across live market feeds.
- [Enterprise Suite for International Credential Evaluation](https://sahilbhanvadiya.vercel.app/case-studies/international-credential-evaluation): EdTech. Role: Lead Full-Stack Architect. Led architecture of three interconnected EdTech SaaS products—a global evaluation database, secure document sharing portal, and algorithmic GPA conversion engine serving 200+ countries.
- [AI-Powered Construction Market Intelligence & Sales Automation](https://sahilbhanvadiya.vercel.app/case-studies/construction-market-intelligence-ai): Enterprise SaaS & AI. Role: Senior Full-Stack & AI Engineer. Engineered an AI-powered construction intelligence platform processing 12,500+ daily market updates across 180K+ projects with LangGraph agent orchestration and integrated sales automation.
- [High-Performance Digital Real Estate Platform](https://sahilbhanvadiya.vercel.app/case-studies/digital-real-estate-platform): Real Estate. Role: Full-Stack Developer. Developed a high-traffic real estate platform for a major regional brokerage with 15-minute listing sync, advanced property search, and a unified franchise ecosystem serving 1,500+ agents.
- [Building a Community-Centric Local Deals & Business Promotion Platform](https://sahilbhanvadiya.vercel.app/case-studies/local-deals-marketplace-platform): E-commerce & Local Advertising. Role: Full-Stack Developer. Built a dual-sided marketplace with frictionless mobile coupon browsing for shoppers and a streamlined vendor SaaS dashboard for local businesses to publish promotions without sign-up barriers.
- [B2B InsurTech Platform for Commercial Quoting & Broker Automation](https://sahilbhanvadiya.vercel.app/case-studies/insurtech-commercial-quoting-platform): InsurTech. Role: Senior Full-Stack Engineer. Engineered a B2B InsurTech SaaS platform replacing manual PDF workflows with dynamic smart applications, real-time multi-carrier quote aggregation, and automated coverage comparison for insurance brokers.
